title: Advanced Dynamic Programming and State Compression · Cost-Model Clinic: Sequence Dp
summary: Scale sequence alignment and constrained-selection models beyond naive tables. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa2 sequence dp increment in an optimized DP with equivalence evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Model longest-common-subsequence and edit-distance choices with boundary rows and reconstruction.
Prove state meaning and transition completeness by induction.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
